text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way home from an outing with Mayano
Top Gun...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer? Do you ever watch live streams
online?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Well, I actually started live streaming!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I dance to popular songs, play games with Teio...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: And do all sorts of other fun stuff!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Drop by my stream! You'll come and watch me,
right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I succumb to Mayano Top Gun's fiery persistence
and agree to watch her next live stream.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days later, I open up her channel...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna land in everyone's hearts! ☆ Time to
start the show here on Channel Maya! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Today's guest is my friend, Marvey!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Hello! ☆ I hope everyone's marvelous!

text_block_list.name: Comments
text_block_list.text:
Viewer A: I've missed you, Maya! Viewer B: I
dunno what exactly you mean by that, but sure,
I'm marvelous. ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Thanks for the comments! I missed you all too! ♪

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Today, the two of us are going to visit some
marvelous places. ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
My engines are fired up for the Coffee Cup Top
Speed Challenge!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! ☆ We've got lots of marvelous traveling
to do today. ★

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Next up is the arcade! We're gonna beat Teio's
high score!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! ☆ I hope we get an ultra-marvelous
score! ★

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, they stream from various locations.
The audience seems to be enjoying their
high-energy shenanigans.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They shine as bright as the sun, with charisma that
could draw anyone in...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Watching Mayano Top Gun's stream, I'm once
again reminded of her appeal.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
...Okay then. It's time to wrap things up. Did
everyone have fun?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As soon as she poses the question, I find myself
typing a comment.
choice_data_list: The stream was a blast to watch!

Sending you all my support! Good luck at your
next race!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, thanks!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'm so glad I was able to make you all excited and
get your engines roaring! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
All of your comments make me super-duper
happy too. ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun flashes an incredibly bright
smile as she speaks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I promise myself that I will continue supporting
her in order to see her smile like that again.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Of course! I'm so much more than just a cute lady. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I have lots of different womanly charms, and I'll
show them off to you all as I race!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Sooo! ☆ Please support me—not just as a
streamer, but during my races too ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I know her appeal as a racer better than anyone
else.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I find myself wishing that the audience who only
came to know her through her live streams could
see her shine during a race too.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Whaaa! You really watched my live stream
yesterday, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! Don't tell me—was this you?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She points out the comment that I left her.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: It was you, right?!
choice_data_list: It was! I can't believe you figured it out.
It was! I can't believe you figured it out.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
When I read that comment, I got this nice warm
feeling inside—the same way I feel when I'm with
you!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
But since we're always together, you might as well
tell me directly, y'know? ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her words, Mayano Top Gun looks pretty
pleased.
